pooling: graph_token_last_layer (virtual/CLS node hidden state, position 0 of final encoder layer, i.e. graph_rep = same representation fed to the pretrained classification head)
notes: Frozen pretrained Graphormer-base (PCQM4Mv2). SMILES->graph via ogb.utils.smiles2graph (OGB node/edge features), then HF preprocess_item + GraphormerDataCollator (Cython algos_graphormer floyd_warshall/gen_edge_input compiled with Cython 0.29.37; transformers 4.37.2 which still ships the Graphormer integration). Embedding = last-layer graph-token hidden state before the LM/classification head. Rows in drugs_ordered.csv order (row i == drug_idx i).
